prompt_preview:
You are a planning system. Given a description of a planning domain and a specific problem, output a valid plan as a sequence of actions.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no reasoning, no commentary. Output

We need to produce a plan (sequence of actions) that leads from the initial state to the goal. The domain is fairly complex, with many actions and constraints. The goal is that capacity is assigned to cold storage facility 1, capacity is assigned to cold storage facility 2, capacity is assigned to farm depot 1, capacity is assigned to satellite depot 1.

We need to interpret the actions and constraints. The domain includes many actions: register incoming batch, pair batch with transport, assign temperature, confirm intake validation, release temperature, assign technician, release technician, assign energy unit, release energy unit, assign quality certificate, release quality certificate, reserve zone a, secure primary supply site for loading, stage input item unit, complete staging, reserve zone b, secure secondary supply site, stage input item unit at secondary, complete staging, assign storage container to zones, assign container and mark zone a content, assign container and mark zone b content, assign storage container to zones (another variant), mark container ready for palletization, reserve pallet slot, record pallet assignment, assign packaging material, apply packaging material, consolidate pallet for quality check, perform quality check, etc. Also actions for regulatory permits, activation, finalization, assign contingency reserve unit, finalize assignments.

Goal: capacity assigned to each of the four allocation entities: cold storage facility 1, cold storage facility 2, farm depot 1, satellite depot 1.

We need to produce a plan that results in capacity assigned to each. The actions that assign capacity are "finalize assignment of primary supply site ...", "finalize secondary supply site assignment ...", "finalize facility assignment and release resources ...". Also there is "finalize assignment to primary site", "finalize assignment to secondary site", but those set "ready for distribution". The capacity assignment appears in "finalize assignment of primary supply site ... to transport ... and contingency reserve unit ...". That sets capacity assigned to the primary supply site. Similarly for secondary supply site. And "finalize facility assignment and release resources for a cold storage facility ..." sets capacity assigned to the cold storage facility.

Thus we need to achieve those final states. We need to ensure that each allocation entity is ready for distribution and then finalize assignment with transport and contingency reserve unit. However we also need to ensure that each entity is allocated as a contingency and assigned transport and contingency reserve unit. The actions "assign contingency reserve unit ... to an allocation entity ..." sets that. Then "finalize assignment of primary supply site ... to transport ... and contingency reserve unit ..." sets capacity assigned. Similarly for secondary supply site and cold storage facility.

Thus we need to produce a sequence of actions that satisfy the preconditions for each of those final actions.

So both facilities serve both sites.

reasoning_details.text:
We need to produce a plan (sequence of actions) that leads from the initial state to the goal. The domain is fairly complex, with many actions and constraints. The goal is that capacity is assigned to cold storage facility 1, capacity is assigned to cold storage facility 2, capacity is assigned to farm depot 1, capacity is assigned to satellite depot 1.

We need to interpret the actions and constraints. The domain includes many actions: register incoming batch, pair batch with transport, assign temperature, confirm intake validation, release temperature, assign technician, release technician, assign energy unit, release energy unit, assign quality certificate, release quality certificate, reserve zone a, secure primary supply site for loading, stage input item unit, complete staging, reserve zone b, secure secondary supply site, stage input item unit at secondary, complete staging, assign storage container to zones, assign container and mark zone a content, assign container and mark zone b content, assign storage container to zones (another variant), mark container ready for palletization, reserve pallet slot, record pallet assignment, assign packaging material, apply packaging material, consolidate pallet for quality check, perform quality check, etc. Also actions for regulatory permits, activation, finalization, assign contingency reserve unit, finalize assignments.

Goal: capacity assigned to each of the four allocation entities: cold storage facility 1, cold storage facility 2, farm depot 1, satellite depot 1.

We need to produce a plan that results in capacity assigned to each. The actions that assign capacity are "finalize assignment of primary supply site ...", "finalize secondary supply site assignment ...", "finalize facility assignment and release resources ...". Also there is "finalize assignment to primary site", "finalize assignment to secondary site", but those set "ready for distribution". The capacity assignment appears in "finalize assignment of primary supply site ... to transport ... and contingency reserve unit ...". That sets capacity assigned to the primary supply site. Similarly for secondary supply site. And "finalize facility assignment and release resources for a cold storage facility ..." sets capacity assigned to the cold storage facility.

Thus we need to achieve those final states. We need to ensure that each allocation entity is ready for distribution and then finalize assignment with transport and contingency reserve unit. However we also need to ensure that each entity is allocated as a contingency and assigned transport and contingency reserve unit. The actions "assign contingency reserve unit ... to an allocation entity ..." sets that. Then "finalize assignment of primary supply site ... to transport ... and contingency reserve unit ..." sets capacity assigned. Similarly for secondary supply site and cold storage facility.

Thus we need to produce a sequence of actions that satisfy the preconditions for each of those final actions.

We need to consider the initial state: we have two cold storage facilities (cold storage facility 1 and 2). Each has container storage container 1 (the same container?), but note that both have container storage container 1. That seems odd: both have the same container. But maybe it's allowed. They each have a pallet slot: cold storage facility 1 has pallet slot 1, cold storage facility 2 has pallet slot 2. They each have a regulatory permit: facility 1 has permit 1, facility 2 has permit 2. They each serve primary site farm depot 1 and secondary site satellite depot 1. So both facilities serve both sites.
